column1: # SYNTHETIC PLACEHOLDER DATA — not real scraped sentiment.
# No archived Ghanaian social sentiment dataset for the Oct-Dec 2024 window
# was available at scaffold time (X academic archive access and Meta Content
# Library access are still pending per README next-actions). This file exists
# so backtest_2024.py is runnable end-to-end as a mechanism test today; it
# does NOT validate the model's real-world accuracy. Replace with genuine
# archived data before treating any backtest_2024.py output as calibration

column2: and say so explicitly in any published methodology page.
